meaning: adj.下等的,下级的,差的,次的,自卑的,劣等的
examples: Modern music is often considered inferior to that of the past.
He preferred the company of those who were intellectually inferior to himself.
They were socially inferior to him.
In many markets, inferior products can act as partial substitutes for more costly superior products.
It says that non-free software is an inferior solution to the practical problem at hand.
